posts.cooked:
WOW…what a cellar offered at Benchmark!
https://www.benchmarkwine.com/collections/Brian-Devine-Cellar/?view=producer

Look at those DRC RC’s!!!


We are excited to present our newest featured cellar: The Brian Devine Cellar.

Having access to new release allocations not normally available to most collectors, Brian Devine built one of the great American cellars during his years running Petco and Toys R Us. Being an active part of multiple serious wine groups, Brian’s wines have been appreciated by many of the country’s top reviewers and collectors for decades. Those lucky enough to view his temperature and humidity controlled cellar have been amazed at some of the hardest to find wines.

Benchmark Wine Group is honored to be able to offer a great selection of his top Burgundy and Bordeaux from the 2005 and 2006 vintages in this offer. Brian sourced all of these from commercial resellers and has kept detailed records. Act quickly as these wines, all in pristine condition, will not be on the market long. Backed by our Provenance Guarantee, collectors should not let this rare opportunity pass! These wines are due to arrive late September.

Cheers!
The Benchmark Crew

Need help placing an order? Contact us!
sales@benchmarkwine.com | 707-255-3500
